name: Sherman Diamonds
description_short: Houston-based jewelry and precious metals buyer offering same-day cash for diamonds, watches, gold, and coins with a certified gemologist and 21-day buyback guarantee.
description_long:
Sherman Diamonds is a Houston-based jewelry and precious metals buyer located in the Greenway Plaza area, serving the greater Houston metropolitan region including River Oaks, West University, Memorial, and surrounding suburbs. The company specializes in purchasing diamonds (certified and non-certified), luxury watches, gold jewelry and bullion, precious coins, and estate jewelry collections. They operate with laboratory-grade testing equipment and claim to be Houston's only certified gemologist buyer with over 20 years of experience in the diamond trade.

The company's core service is immediate cash purchases for jewelry and precious items. They offer same-day payment without credit checks, professional appraisals using laboratory-grade equipment, and a distinctive 21-day buyback guarantee where customers can return items at full purchase price if they change their mind. Sherman Diamonds also advertises a price-match guarantee: they claim to beat any written offer from competitors by 15% or will repurchase items at full price within 21 days.

What distinguishes Sherman Diamonds from typical pawn shops is their emphasis on professional certification and expertise. The owner operates as a certified gemologist rather than a general pawn broker, and the company highlights laboratory-grade testing equipment and competitive appraisal practices. They position themselves as a jewelry dealer rather than a traditional pawn operation, also mentioning they sell fine jewelry and luxury watches alongside their buying operations. The convenient location in an upscale area (Greenway Plaza) and appointment-based model also differentiate them from standard pawn shops.

However, potential customers should note that this is fundamentally a jewelry buyer that exchanges items for cash—typical of pawn operations—with the added layer of certification and guarantees. The 21-day buyback promise and price-match guarantee suggest confidence in their valuations but also indicate they expect some customers may seek alternative offers. The business model depends on acquiring items at prices that allow them to resell or melt down materials profitably, which is standard industry practice but means customers should understand they're receiving wholesale value, not retail value.
address: 3823 Richmond Ave Suite A, Houston, TX 77027

company_info.headquarters: 3823 Richmond Ave Suite A, Houston, TX 77027

pros: Certified gemologist operator with 20+ years diamond trade experience, unlike typical pawn brokers
Laboratory-grade testing equipment for precise appraisals, allowing identification of value other buyers may miss
15% price-match guarantee: beats any written competitor offer by 15% or repurchases at full price
21-day buyback promise allows customers to reverse sale decision for full refund within three weeks
Same-day payment with no credit checks or waiting periods
Convenient location in Greenway Plaza serving multiple Houston neighborhoods and suburbs
Accepts wide variety of items: certified/non-certified diamonds, luxury watches, gold, coins, and estate collections
cons: Still operates as a cash-for-items business model; customers receive wholesale value, not retail resale value
Open only five days per week (Monday-Friday implied), requiring appointment scheduling
Price-match guarantee and buyback promise may indicate they expect customers to shop competing offers, suggesting their initial offer may not be final best offer
No online valuation or remote appraisal options mentioned; must visit showroom in person
Limited to Houston area geographic service despite claims to serve 'central point across the country'
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash who own diamonds, luxury watches, or gold jewelry and want professional certification-backed appraisals
Estate executors or heirs liquidating jewelry collections quickly with professional valuation
People seeking confidence in fair pricing through guarantees and wanting 21-day reconsideration period before finalizing sales
Sellers in Houston area wanting certified gemologist evaluation rather than generalist pawn broker assessment
diagnosis: Sherman Diamonds is best for Houston-area sellers with diamonds, watches, or precious metals who want professional certified gemologist evaluation and the security of a 21-day reconsideration period. Main caveat: this is still a cash-for-items pawn operation where customers receive wholesale buyback prices, not retail values, and customers should understand they'll receive less than they would if selling directly to another consumer.
services: Certified diamond appraisal and purchase (certified and non-certified stones)
Luxury watch buying (Rolex, Patek Philippe, and similar brands)
Estate jewelry collection appraisal and purchase
21-day buyback guarantee at full purchase price
